title: The Informant File — Raab's Leverage
description: In the Trabant queue, Oberst Raab pauses beside you and says, without looking at you, a name — Anna Schreiber — and a file number. He says nothing else. He walks on toward the command post. The name means nothing to you unless you are the Journalist or the Gatekeeper — but if you have spoken to Raab, or if you have been watching the crowd carefully, you understand what the file number means. There is a young woman at the front of that crowd who carries a secret that Raab can use. The question is whether he will use it to move her out of the way — or to keep her exactly where she is, as a pressure point against Jäger, who will not fire into a crowd that contains a registered informant whose file he has seen.
